steps.title: Find the linear relationship
steps.content: Using the table points $(3,9)$ and $(5,11)$, the slope is $$m=\frac{11-9}{5-3}=1.$$ So $p=c+b$.

steps.title: Match the answer form
steps.content: Rewrite $p=c+6$ by subtracting $p$ from both sides: $$c-p=-6.$$ That matches the computed answer, so A is correct.
